description: Stripe Connect service, revenue share engine (90/10 ad, 95/5 tips), wallet/subscription/tip/cashout/ledger services in packages/payments/src/services/, with Zod validation and comprehensive tests
steps: Create packages/payments/src/services/stripe-connect.service.ts with Express accounts for creators: createCreatorAccount (onboarding link), getAccountStatus, transferToCreator, createPayout. Use Stripe SDK (already a dep). Validate inputs with Zod schemas. Follow the pattern in gateway-service.ts for Stripe mocking setup.

Create packages/payments/src/services/revshare.service.ts - a new revenue share engine that implements 90/10 split on ad revenue and 95/5 on tips. Uses an immutable ledger approach (entries are append-only, never modified). Methods: recordAdRevenue(creatorId, adImpressionId, grossAmount), recordTip(creatorId, tipId, grossAmount), getCreatorBalance(creatorId), getPlatformBalance(), getLedgerEntries(creatorId). Each entry stores: id, type (ad_revenue|tip), creatorId, grossAmount, creatorShare, platformShare, timestamp. This is separate from the existing RevenueSharing class which has different default splits.

Create packages/payments/src/services/creator-wallet.service.ts - custodial wallet per user/creator with credit, debit, getBalance, getTransactions. This wraps the existing WalletService pattern but adds creator-specific logic: earningsBalance (from revshare), pendingBalance (held for payout period), availableBalance (ready for cashout). Methods: createCreatorWallet, creditEarnings, debitForCashout, getBalanceBreakdown, freezeWallet.

Create packages/payments/src/services/creator-subscription.service.ts - per-creator subscription tiers allowing fans to subscribe. Methods: createTier(creatorId, name, price, benefits), updateTier, deleteTier, subscribe(fanId, creatorId, tierId), cancelSubscription, getSubscribers(creatorId), getSubscriptions(fanId). Uses Zod validation. Integrates concept of Stripe subscription creation (mocked).

Create packages/payments/src/services/tip.service.ts - one-tap tips with preset amounts ($1, $2, $5, $10, $20, $50, custom). Methods: sendTip(fromUserId, toCreatorId, amount, message?), getTipsReceived(creatorId), getTipsSent(userId). Validates amount > 0. Records in revshare ledger with 95/5 split. Uses Zod schemas.

Create packages/payments/src/services/cashout.service.ts - bank transfer / instant debit for creators. Methods: requestCashout(creatorId, amount, method: 'bank_transfer' | 'instant'), getCashoutHistory(creatorId), getCashoutStatus(cashoutId). Validates sufficient available balance. Uses Stripe Connect transfer under the hood.

Create packages/payments/src/services/ledger.service.ts - immutable transaction ledger. Every financial event (tip, ad rev, cashout, subscription payment) creates an immutable LedgerEntry. Methods: record(entry), getEntries(filters), getBalance(accountId), verify() to ensure sum integrity. Entries cannot be modified or deleted, only appended.

Update packages/payments/src/types.ts - add new types: CreatorAccount, CreatorWallet, CreatorSubscriptionTier, Tip, CashoutRequest, CashoutStatus, LedgerEntry, LedgerEntryType, RevShareEntry, RevShareType enums.
Update packages/payments/src/index.ts - export all new services and types.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/stripe-connect.service.test.ts - mock Stripe SDK, test createCreatorAccount, getAccountStatus, transferToCreator, createPayout. Verify Zod validation rejects bad inputs.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/revshare.service.test.ts - test $100 ad spend produces $90 creator / $10 platform. Test $5 tip produces $4.75 creator / $0.25 platform. Test ledger immutability. Test getCreatorBalance aggregation.
Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/creator-wallet.service.test.ts - test credit/debit/getBalance, balance breakdown (earnings vs pending vs available), freeze functionality.
Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/creator-subscription.service.test.ts - test tier CRUD, fan subscribe/cancel, getSubscribers/getSubscriptions.
Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/tip.service.test.ts - test sendTip with preset amounts, verify 95/5 split recorded, validate rejection of zero/negative amounts.
Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/cashout.service.test.ts - test requestCashout validates balance, test getCashoutHistory, test status transitions.

Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/ledger.service.test.ts - test immutability (entries cannot be modified), test getEntries filtering, test balance computation, test verify() integrity check.
acceptance_criteria: $100 ad spend test: recordAdRevenue(creator, impression, 100) produces ledger entry with creatorShare=90, platformShare=10
$5 tip test: recordTip(creator, tip, 5) produces ledger entry with creatorShare=4.75, platformShare=0.25
Stripe Connect: createCreatorAccount returns account URL, getAccountStatus returns status, transferToCreator calls stripe.transfers.create, createPayout calls stripe.payouts.create (all mocked)
Creator subscription: createTier + subscribe creates subscription entry, cancelSubscription marks it cancelled
Wallet balance updates correctly on credit/debit operations
Ledger entries are immutable - no update/delete methods exposed
Cashout validates available balance before processing
All new services have comprehensive .test.ts files
All Zod schemas reject invalid inputs in tests
verification: Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run and confirm all tests pass including new ones
Run npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/payments/tsconfig.json to confirm type safety
findings: All 122 new tests pass. TypeScript type check passes for new code (pre-existing errors in wallet-service.ts, subscription-service.ts, revenue-sharing-service.ts are not from this change). Prettier formatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. Commit-msg hook enforces 100-char header limit.
